name: blog_chapter
schema:
CREATE TABLE "blog_chapter" (
   [id] INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
   [created] TEXT,
   [updated] TEXT,
   [title] TEXT,
   [slug] TEXT,
   [body] TEXT,
   [order] INTEGER,
   [is_draft] INTEGER,
   [guide_id] INTEGER REFERENCES [blog_guide]([id]),
   [card_image] TEXT,
   [import_ref] TEXT,
   [metadata] TEXT,
   [search_document] TEXT,
   [series_id] TEXT REFERENCES [blog_series]([id]),
   [section_id] INTEGER REFERENCES [blog_guidesection]([id])
)
